title: Fix parsing of the --tmpfs option
body: With StringSlice, we're seeing individual options added and parsed separately, so `tmpfs:nosuid,nodev` turns into three tmpfs mounts passed into pkg/sec (tmpfs:, nosuid, nodev). Swap to StringArray to tell cobra this can't be split on commas.
